creator: lyndon@orthanc.com
text:
File(1) doesn't recognize HTML files.

/etc/magic probably belongs in /usr/share/misc/magic.

Fix: Appended is a /usr/src/usr.bin/file/Magdir/html file with some really
simple heuristics for spotting HTML files, and a diff to the Makefile
to install the magic file in /usr/share/misc (does it really need to
be in /etc? I can't spot any dependencies on this ...)


# *Really* simple check for HTML
0	string		\<HTML>		HTML text
0	string		\<html>		HTML text


*** 1.1	1995/10/05 00:52:24
--- Makefile	1995/10/05 00:52:47
***************
